title: clibadium hispidulum
intro: Clibadium hispidulum, also known as hairy clibadium, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Clibadium hispidulum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
